_comment: SPY-style weekly-to-date SWING strategy, run on QQQ (higher vol) as a SEPARATE round-trip sleeve, kept apart from the SPY accumulator. Buys QQQ when the week is unusually DOWN (fade a dip), sells the WHOLE position when it reverts to the week's mean / stops / times out. long_only (cash account, no shorts). Params = the OOS-tuned config from spy.json's 'Fade · 1σ · TUNED'. 'capital' here is only a fallback; live sizing uses the swing sleeve budget from allocation.py (swing_pct of the real account value).
